title: ENTERPILOT/GoModel
summary: AI gateway written in Go. Lightweight unified OpenAI-compatible API for OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Groq, xAI & Ollama. LiteLLM alternative with observability, guardrails, streaming, costs and usage tracking.

title: mikeljc-dev/docsera
summary: AI chat widget for your docs — open source, self-hosted, privacy-first. RAG with citations. Works with Anthropic, OpenAI or local models via Ollama.

title: nikazzio/glossa
summary: Multi-stage AI translation pipeline for scholars. Desktop app powered by Tauri, React, and Rust. Supports Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, and Ollama.

title: vinpatel/vinos
summary: An agentic OS for founders, innovators, and thinkers. Local LLMs + Claude Code, one keystroke away — on any x86_64 laptop, workstation, or server.

title: ZeroDot1/LLMWikiNG
summary: LLMWikiNG is a local, privacy-friendly wiki platform developed by ZeroDot1 and based on the Karpathy LLM Wiki Pattern. The wiki is maintained and expanded by AI assistants—and you can easily read, search, and manage it right in your browser.

title: AashishH15/Lexicon
summary: A local-first, offline AI writing assistant. Grammar, rewriting & tone entirely on your machine.

title: LucidPrinciples/lucid-cove
summary: A private, self-hosted home for your family and its intelligence. Named agents with memory and daily practice — your data, your models, your machine.

title: Abrechen2/sublarr
summary: Self-hosted subtitle manager & LLM translator for anime and media — *arr-compatible, fully local

title: Decamorf/archiving-and-structuring-information-from-links
summary: Archiving and structuring information from links: videos/articles/posts → structured.md with summary, (Whisper + Ollama).

title: bug-ops/zeph
summary: A memory-first AI agent that remembers why decisions were made — not just the last message. Runs local (Ollama), cloud (Claude · OpenAI · Gemini), or decentralized TEE. Graph memory, self-learning skills, multi-model routing, sandboxed tools. MCP · ACP · A2A. One Rust binary.

title: mdesalvo/Morgana
summary: A magical witch assistant equipped with an enchanted grimoire powered by AI, yet shaped by you: your agents, your prompts, your tools...woven into her spells.

title: royxforge/rag-evaluation-framework
summary: Production-grade RAG evaluation library: faithfulness, hallucination, retrieval precision, answer relevance, context coverage, and UCM, an unsupervised confidence metric requiring no ground-truth labels.

title: h1ddenpr0cess20/wordmark
summary: Client-side AI chat for OpenAI & xAI Responses APIs and local LM Studio/Ollama — tool calling, MCP, TTS, and fully local storage, no backend required.

title: Zanmmi/micro-agent-cli
summary: 🏆 Ultralight AI Coding Agent 2026 — Blazing CLI, Tiny Codebase, Full Power Free

title: MariusYvard/corparius
summary: Self-hosted framework for autonomous AI micro-companies. Describe a business in plain language and corparius runs it as scheduled cognitive agents (a CEO plus nine operational roles), guarded by a budget and loop firewall, with local-first LLM routing.

title: MasihMoafi/Elpis
summary: You put an agent into an Elpis, and it becomes Elpis; Be Elpis my friend.

title: EzzoHamdan/house-of-wisdom-mcp
summary: House of Wisdom MCP — multi-model consultation council. Diverse AI model families investigate independently and return their own perspectives; the orchestrator weighs them. Inspired by the medieval Bayt al-Hikma.

title: kstevica/captain-claw
summary: Self-hosted framework for orchestrating fleets of specialist AI agents — ensemble reasoning and a full agentic coding pipeline, model-agnostic and local-friendly.

title: backupliton98-star/ai-commander-core
summary: Kodiqa-agent 2026 - Open Source AI Coding Agent with 7 Providers & 69 Commands

title: zivtech/accessibility-skills
summary: Accessibility Skills (accessibility-skills): AI skills that plan, review, test, and audit web accessibility (WCAG 2.2) — Accessibility Planner, Critic, Tester, Perspective Audit, and Bug Reporting for Claude Code, Codex, and local models, with cross-model benchmarks.
